qas.q: Describe the relationship between Joint Operations Planning and Execution Systems (JOPES) volumes and AFI 10-401
qas.a:
10-401 augments the joint operations planning and execution system volumes with detailed Air Force guidance and instructions.

JOPES volumes provide detailed guidance and instructions on the planning process. Subsequent chapters in this instruction augment the JOPES volumes with detailed Air Force guidance and instructions

AFI 10-401 prescribes and explains how the Air Force participates in the Joint Planning and Execution Community (JPEC) including force presentations and Contingency and Execution Planning and Execution Segments (DCAPES)., for the planning, deployment, employment, sustainment, redeployment, and reconstitution of forces

qas.q: Identify the planning guidance found in AFI 10-401
qas.a: AFI 10-401 covers the procedures and standards that govern operations planning and execution throughout the Air Force. It applies to all Air Force, including Air Reserve Component personnel, who participate in the JPEC, including the planning, deployment, employment, sustainment, redeployment, and reconstitution of forces.
